title: Shot Glass Measuring Cup 3 Ounce/90ML Liquid Heavy High Espresso Glass Cup Black Line
description:
About this item
[EASY TO READE]Easily measure and transport smaller amounts without them spilling; steadier than using measuring spoons; perfect for kitchen, home, lawn, and garden
[HEAVYWEIGHT GLASS] allows clear view of contents for more control and accuracy; weighted base helps reduce tipping for less mess
[CONVENIENT INDICATION]With line markings graduated in double scale （fluid ounces and millilters） all the way up to 3oz, this mini measuring glass has the information you're looking for
[THICK and DURABLE] The Thick, Durable Sham provides stability, this measuring glass is perfectly balanced to sit safely on bar or kitchen counters as you delegate the necessary ingredients
[MULTI-PURPOSE LIQUID ]Dry 3OZ/90ML measures dry and liquid ingredients for creating balanced recipes, mixing delicious beverages, making craft cocktails, and more
reviews_5s: The numbers are easy to read and it is the perfect size for what I neededLove this small measuring glass. It’s made really well, quite thick and has a pour spout. It’s great for taking liquid medications or other of types of liquids where you need just 1-3 oz…Vastly better than the cutesy conical shaped type that spill easily. Easy to see how much is going into it and even helps me understand the metric measurement systemSubstantial. Very clear markings.These small measuring cups are perfect! They feel sturdy enough and I love the ability to measure from 10 ml to 90 ml as some of my recipes are in ml.I’ve been searching for a way to measure small amounts of liquid, and this well-made shot glass is perfect! The thick bottom keeps the glass stable, & the various forms of measurement are nicely painted & easy to read.My husband loves this little glass measuring cup, especially for making mixed drinks. The markings are in black and easy to see. We actually have two!Heavt weight solid glassPERFECT 4 MEASUREING 4 DRINKs !!!!!!Very user friendly, good quality
reviews_1s: Loved the idea of a glass measuring tool for the bar with stylish black markings. Just under 2 months, no dishwasher exposure (hand wash only)....and all the black markings are wiping away. It will be a useless glass beaker in no time. Very disappointed.
